channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya to host industrial expo in Nairobi to strengthen investment and trade ties with China

item.description: This sponsored travel feature presents a suggested 72-hour itinerary designed to highlight Montréal’s rich cultural landscape, blending history, art, outdoor spaces, and its renowned summer festival s...

item.title: Senator Marco Rubio Joins Diplomatic Efforts in Israel-Lebanon Conflict Talks
item.description: Florida Senator Marco Rubio is expected to join high-level diplomatic talks aimed at easing tensions between Israel and Lebanon amid escalating border clashes and broader regional instability involvin...

item.title: MMF calls on Federal Government to intensify efforts to rescue remaining Chibok girls
item.description: The Murtala Muhammed Foundation (MMF) has renewed calls on the Federal Government of Nigeria to step up efforts towards securing the release of the remaining Chibok girls who are still in captivity mo...

item.title: Police watchdog investigates Met officers over handling of Wimbledon school crash deaths
item.description: An investigation has been launched by the Independent Office for Police Conduct (IOPC) into the conduct of eleven Metropolitan Police officers in relation to their handling of the initial inquiry into...

item.title: Light Strengthens Plant Tissues While Limiting Stem Growth, Study Finds
item.description: Researchers at Osaka Metropolitan University have discovered a previously unrecognized mechanism by which light influences plant growth. Focusing on young pea stems, the team found that plants grown u...

item.title: U.S. Naval Forces Prepare to Implement Trump’s Blockade Against Iran Amid Stalled Cease-Fire Talks
item.description: Recent coverage from the Wall Street Journal focuses on the increasing tension between the United States and Iran after cease-fire negotiations failed to make progress. The report highlights U.S. nava...

item.title: Delta: Elderly Man Dies After Kidnapping by Construction Workers
item.description: A heartbreaking incident has unfolded in Delta State, Nigeria, where an 80-year-old man, Peter Keborkwu, tragically lost his life at the hands of the artisans he hired to renovate his property. The du...

item.title: Bravery honours awarded to responders of Bondi Junction stabbing attack
item.description: Eight people have been formally recognised for their extraordinary bravery during the deadly stabbing attack at Westfield Bondi Junction in Sydney in April 2024. The incident, which lasted around six ...

item.title: Atul Bora seeks third consecutive victory from Bokakhat in Assam Assembly election 2026
item.description: Atul Bora, president of the Asom Gana Parishad (AGP), is contesting from the Bokakhat Assembly constituency in the 2026 Assam elections with the aim of securing a historic third consecutive win. The s...

item.title: Memorial of Raila Odinga’s Former Bodyguard Highlights His Spacious Asembo Home
item.description: A memorial service held on Saturday, April 11, for George Oduor, who served as Raila Odinga’s personal bodyguard for over 30 years, brought his private life into the public eye. The event, held in Ase...

item.title: PSX rebounds by over 4,000 points amid volatile trading and easing sentiment
item.description: On Tuesday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a strong recovery during intraday trading, as the benchmark KSE-100 index surged by 4,132.44 points, representing a 2.57 percent increase. By 11...

item.title: South African Golf Faces a Transition Period in the Quest for Its Next Major Champion
item.description: South African golf finds itself in a reflective phase as the country continues to search for its next Major winner more than a decade after Ernie Els claimed The Open Championship in 2012. That victor...

item.title: Apple consolidates iWork apps on macOS with Creator Studio versions
item.description: Apple has removed older versions of its iWork apps — Pages, Keynote, and Numbers — from the Mac App Store, leaving only the newer editions that integrate with Apple Creator Studio. This change, first ...

item.title: Council Worker Salaries: A Comparison with Prime Ministerial Pay
item.description: A Sky News investigation, reportedly focusing on the salaries of local council employees, has revealed that a significant number receive remuneration exceeding that of the Prime Minister. The report a...

item.title: Kenyan-made climate camera set for International Space Station arrival on Monday evening
item.description: A Kenyan-led scientific payload known as ClimCam is set to arrive at the International Space Station (ISS) on Monday evening following a successful launch into space on Saturday at 1.41pm East African...

item.title: Britney Spears voluntarily enters rehab following DUI arrest and upcoming court appearance

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate amid diplomatic breakdown and Hormuz Strait threats
